description: This file defines the MainActivity class for an Android app, handling user interface navigation, authentication flows, biometric unlocking, and API calls within the app.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity handling UI rendering, login, biometric unlock, and logout functionalities.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, sets the view, and adds lifecycle observer.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Re-renders the UI when activity resumes.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Determines the current authentication state and displays appropriate UI.

methods.name: showLogin
methods.description: Displays the login screen and handles login button click.

methods.name: showMain
methods.description: Displays the main app screen with session info and API call button.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Replaces the current view in the container with a new view.
